policy.purpose: validation, pretraining, smoke testing, and model evaluation only

download_todos.blocker: Figshare command-line download is blocked by AWS WAF challenge.
download_todos.next_action: Open the Figshare page in a browser, download the archive manually, place it under raw/, extract it under processed/, then record file size, sha256, and annotation format.

download_todos.blocker: Hugging Face dataset is manual gated and requires account approval.
download_todos.next_action: Log in to Hugging Face, accept the dataset terms, download with the approved account, then update this manifest with checksums and split/annotation metadata.

download_todos.blocker: Large pathology-validated dataset needs official/manual dataset access.
download_todos.next_action: Follow the publication data-access link, download the official archive, verify pathology labels, and register it as classification/external-validation data.

download_todos.blocker: Download is routed through Redivis official flow.
download_todos.next_action: Use the Redivis account/terms flow, download cine clips and metadata, then document clip, segmentation, TI-RADS, and pathology fields.

download_todos.blocker: General heterogeneous ultrasound dataset; not first-priority thyroid detector data.
download_todos.next_action: Download only after the primary thyroid datasets are ready, then tag thyroid-relevant subsets for robustness/domain-shift checks.

download_todos.blocker: Original host did not resolve from this machine.
download_todos.next_action: Find a reliable mirror with clear license terms, download only after source legitimacy is confirmed, then record checksum and annotation format.

datasets.name: TN3K: Thyroid Nodule Dataset for Segmentation and Classification
notes: Official Hugging Face endpoint timed out in the local network during this download; the mirror resolved the same public repository file.
Masks are stored as JPG files under trainval-mask and test-mask.
This dataset is suitable for segmentation and classification validation; detection bboxes should be derived from masks before YOLO/RT-DETR training.

datasets.name: Sample-of-UD-TN
datasets.download_url_used: GitHub API blobs from repository tree master
notes: Only the repository sample was downloaded, not the full UD-TN dataset.
The sample has benign and malignant subfolders for train, test, and small-nodule test checks.

datasets.name: TN5000: An Ultrasound Image Dataset for Thyroid Nodule Detection and Classification
notes: The Figshare page is reachable in a browser, but command-line download returned an AWS WAF challenge on 2026-05-09.
Manual browser download is required unless a trusted institutional mirror is provided.
This remains the preferred first detector dataset once downloaded because it includes detection annotations.

datasets.name: ThyroidXL
notes: The Hugging Face API reports this dataset as manual gated.
Download requires accepting the dataset terms with a Hugging Face account.

datasets.name: ThyUS2Path
notes: Useful for pathology-validated classification and external validation.
Not the first detector-training choice because public metadata is classification-oriented rather than bbox-oriented.

datasets.name: Stanford Thyroid Ultrasound Cine-clip
notes: Dataset page lists biopsy-confirmed nodules, cine clips, radiologist segmentations, TI-RADS descriptors, and histopathology.
Download is routed through Redivis, so it should be handled with the official account/terms flow.

datasets.name: Annotated Heterogeneous Ultrasound Database
notes: This is a heterogeneous multi-organ ultrasound dataset that includes thyroid among other organs.
Use only as a robustness/domain-shift probe, not as a primary thyroid nodule detector benchmark.

datasets.name: Digital Database Thyroid Images
notes: The original host did not resolve from this machine on 2026-05-09.
Use only if a reliable mirror and license terms are confirmed.
